title: 10 Things a Man Does Differently in His 20s
caption:
Your 20s are where a man gets built. Or they're where he drifts and figures it out at 35 — if he's lucky.

The gap between the two isn't usually a dramatic decision. It's ten small ones, made consistently, that nobody sees at the time.

Save this. Send it to a brother who's in the middle of his.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #christianity #20s
theme: He works — and gets built in the process.
